A

accept() - Method in class eapli.exemplo.utentemanagement.domain.SignupRequest
 
ACCEPTED - Enum constant in enum class eapli.exemplo.utentemanagement.domain.ApprovalStatus
 
AcceptRefuseSignupFactory - Class in eapli.exemplo.utentemanagement.application
A simple factory to obtain the desired implementation of the
invalid reference 
AcceptRefuseSignupController
.
AcceptRefuseSignupFactory() - Constructor for class eapli.exemplo.utentemanagement.application.AcceptRefuseSignupFactory
 
AcceptRefuseSignupRequestController - Interface in eapli.exemplo.utentemanagement.application
The controller for the use case "Accept or refuse signup request".
AcceptRefuseSignupRequestControllerEventfullImpl - Class in eapli.exemplo.utentemanagement.application
the controller for the use case "Accept or refuse signup request" this implementation makes use of domain events to (1) follow the rule that one controller should only modify one aggregate, and (2) notify other parts of the system to react accordingly.
AcceptRefuseSignupRequestControllerEventfullImpl() - Constructor for class eapli.exemplo.utentemanagement.application.AcceptRefuseSignupRequestControllerEventfullImpl
 
AcceptRefuseSignupRequestControllerTxImpl - Class in eapli.exemplo.utentemanagement.application
The transactional controller for the use case "accept/refuse a signup request".
AcceptRefuseSignupRequestControllerTxImpl() - Constructor for class eapli.exemplo.utentemanagement.application.AcceptRefuseSignupRequestControllerTxImpl

ExemploPasswordPolicy - Class in eapli.exemplo.usermanagement.domain
